description: Repo-native institutional memory CLI for Enterprise Architecture. Stores decisions, events, entities, and relationships in SQLite alongside code, with deterministic export to markdown/JSONL for version control.
name: cwmem

description: Embedded relational database backing cwmem's runtime storage. Houses entries, events, entities, edges, FTS5 indexes, embeddings, and idempotency records. Schema version 3.
name: SQLite

description: Lightweight offline embedding model vendored with cwmem. Produces 384-dim float32 vectors for semantic search without API calls. Stored at models/model2vec/ in the repo.
name: Model2Vec

description: CLI framework used for command definitions and argument parsing. All commands registered via typer.Typer app in __main__.py with per-module register() functions.
name: Typer

description: Data validation and serialization framework. All input/output models defined in core/models.py with strict validation, ConfigDict(extra='forbid'), and model validators.
name: Pydantic

description: Author and maintainer of cwmem. Enterprise architect. GitHub: ThomasRohde.
name: Thomas Klok Rohde
